title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 10 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 96%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 100%, and average score is 7.89/10. Total training hours are 216 and scaled cost is 15. Overall effectiveness classification is Effective. Management interpretation: The training course 'DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring' has demonstrated strong performance metrics, with a completion rate of 100%, a pass rate of 100%, and an average score of 7.89 out of 10. The overall attendance rate stands at 96%, indicating high engagement among trainees. The effectiveness classification is rated as Effective, suggesting that the training met its intended objectives.
insights: DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring has an effectiveness score of 92.28 in the selected scope.
The course successfully engaged all 10 trainees, achieving full completion and pass rates.
The average feedback rating of 4.6 out of 5 reflects positive trainee perceptions of the course content and delivery.
The total training hours amounted to 216, with a scaled cost of 15, resulting in an effectiveness score of 92.28.
The ROI proxy of 0.0207 indicates a favorable return on investment relative to the training costs.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.
To maintain and enhance the effectiveness of future training initiatives, it is recommended to continue leveraging successful course elements identified in this program.

Additionally, consider implementing advanced training techniques or supplementary resources to further elevate trainee performance and engagement, particularly for those who may benefit from additional support.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
